mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bt_backtest_analysis (record_id, kind, saved_at, stock_code, stock_codes_json, period, back_start, back_end, init_capital, final_asset, total_trade_num, event_count, summary, events_json) VALUES (#{recordId}, #{kind}, #{savedAt}, #{stockCode}, #{stockCodesJson}, #{period}, #{backStart}, #{backEnd}, #{initCapital}, #{finalAsset}, #{totalTradeNum}, #{eventCount}, #{summary}, #{eventsJson})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bt_backtest_analysis WHERE record_id = #{recordId} LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM bt_backtest_analysis WHERE kind = 'SINGLE' AND stock_code = #{stockCode}
